events.raw_text:
# Vilnius dbt Meetup - October 29, 2024

**Event Title:** Vilnius dbt Meetup (Baltic dbt Meetup)

**Date & Time:** Tuesday, October 29, 2024, 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM EET

**Location:** Cyber City Building C, Švitrigailos str. 32, Vilnius, Lithuania

**Host:** dbt Labs (Super Organizer)

**Event Description:**
The inaugural Baltic dbt Meetup features data engineering professionals sharing real-world dbt applications. Speakers include experts from Oxylabs, Surfshark, and TeraSky discussing how dbt impacts their work and future directions.

**Agenda:**
- 18:00-18:15: Refreshments and networking
- 18:15-18:20: Welcome remarks
- 18:20-18:50: "Introduction to dbt Cloud" by Gediminas Krištopaitis, Data Tech Lead at TeraSky
- 18:50-19:20: "Building a scalable analytics architecture with dbt Core and Airflow" by Laima Plėšnytė, Data Analyst at Oxylabs
- 19:20-19:30: Break
- 19:30-20:00: "Surfshark's Journey to Analytics Engineering" by Marius Žukauskas, Analytics Engineering Team Lead at Surfshark
- 20:00+: Pizza, beverages, and networking

**Duration:** Approximately 2 hours

**Attendee Information:** Not publicly displayed on this event page

talks.description: An introduction to dbt Cloud, covering its features and how teams can use the managed platform for dbt development and deployment.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18:20-18:50: "Introduction to dbt Cloud" by Gediminas Krištopaitis, Data Tech Lead at TeraSky
talks.title: Introduction to dbt Cloud

talks.description: How Oxylabs built a scalable analytics architecture combining dbt Core for transformations with Airflow for orchestration.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18:50-19:20: "Building a scalable analytics architecture with dbt Core and Airflow" by Laima Plėšnytė, Data Analyst at Oxylabs
talks.title: Building a scalable analytics architecture with dbt Core and Airflow

talks.description: A case study of Surfshark's organizational journey adopting analytics engineering practices and building the discipline within the company.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 19:30-20:00: "Surfshark's Journey to Analytics Engineering" by Marius Žukauskas, Analytics Engineering Team Lead at Surfshark
talks.speaker_title: Analytics Engineering Team Lead at Surfshark
talks.title: Surfshark's Journey to Analytics Engineering

additional_metadata.note: Registration mandatory via Eventbrite with limited spots. Attendee count not publicly displayed on the event page.

events.agenda: Second Vilnius dbt meetup bringing together data professionals to discuss real-world analytics experiences, with case studies from TeraSky, Vinted, and Kilo Health focused on practical solutions and networking.
events.event_description: This gathering brings together data professionals to discuss real-world analytics experiences. The event features insightful case studies from TeraSky, Vinted, and Kilo Health with emphasis on practical solutions and networking opportunities.
events.raw_text:
# Vilnius dbt Meetup #2 - Event Details

**Event Title:** Vilnius dbt Meetup #2

**Date & Time:** Thursday, March 13, 2025, 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM EET

**Location:** Vinted Vilnius HQ, Švitrigailos 13, Vilnius

**Host:** dbt Labs (Super Organizer)

**Group:** Baltic dbt Meetup

---

## Event Description

This gathering brings together data professionals to discuss real-world analytics experiences. The event features "insightful case studies from TeraSky, Vinted, and Kilo Health" with emphasis on practical solutions and networking opportunities.

## Schedule

- **17:00-17:30** – Welcome refreshments
- **17:30-18:00** – "From Development to Production: Mastering dbt CI/CD with Argo Workflows" by Gediminas Krištopaitis, Data Team Lead at TeraSky
- **18:00-18:30** – "Getting to dbt: data ingestion at Vinted" by Saulius Valatka, Staff Engineer at Vinted
- **18:30-19:00** – "Orchestrating dbt with Airflow Datasets" by Valerija Životkevič, Data Engineer at Kilo Health
- **19:00+** – Networking

**Duration:** Approximately 3 hours

**Registration:** Required with limited spots available via Eventbrite

talks.description: How TeraSky manages dbt CI/CD from development to production using Argo Workflows for pipeline automation.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 17:30-18:00 – "From Development to Production: Mastering dbt CI/CD with Argo Workflows" by Gediminas Krištopaitis, Data Team Lead at TeraSky
talks.title: From Development to Production: Mastering dbt CI/CD with Argo Workflows

talks.description: A look at how Vinted handles data ingestion upstream of dbt, covering the pipeline that feeds their transformation layer.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18:00-18:30 – "Getting to dbt: data ingestion at Vinted" by Saulius Valatka, Staff Engineer at Vinted
talks.title: Getting to dbt: data ingestion at Vinted

talks.description: How Kilo Health orchestrates dbt runs using Airflow Datasets for data-aware scheduling.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18:30-19:00 – "Orchestrating dbt with Airflow Datasets" by Valerija Životkevič, Data Engineer at Kilo Health
talks.title: Orchestrating dbt with Airflow Datasets

status.notes: Attendee counts not publicly displayed on either event page (event #2 used Eventbrite for registration), so attendees is null for both. Both events have exactly 3 talks (within 2-3 validation range). Only the two event URLs provided by the user were processed; the group is named 'Baltic dbt Meetup' on Meetup.
